episodes.title: It Will Be Worth It All: Nate Shares His Story of Growing Up in IBLP
episodes.description:
Nate's parents loved him. They weren't abusive. Nobody was drinking. Nobody was yelling. From the outside — and often from the inside — it looked like a good home. But IBLP had quietly shaped everything about it: what they studied, how they spoke, how morality was defined, and who held authority over whom. As the oldest child, Nate learned from an early age to keep the peace, perform goodness, and make sure everyone was happy. If something went wrong, it was probably his fault. If something felt wrong, it was probably a spiritual attack.

Nate didn't know how much that mindset had cost him until decades later, when Shiny Happy People — the documentary about the Duggar family — cracked something open that he didn't even know was there. This episode is about what was buried, how it got there, and what it has taken — slowly, imperfectly — to dig it back out. And what he would say now to that little boy who spent his whole childhood performing goodness for a watching world — if only that boy could hear him.

#iblp #duggarfamily #cultsurvivor #cultawareness #homeschooling #evangelicals 

  •  ACA Website (https://adultchildren.org/) 
  •  The How We Escaped Podcast Website: ⁠HowWeEscaped.com⁠
  •  Music Credits: Please ⁠click here ⁠ (https://howweescaped.com/music-credits-how-we-escaped-podcast/) with a special thanks to Kevin Mcleod

episodes.title: Mini Episode with Amanda Briggs - Working in the IBLP Training Centers
episodes.description:
In ⁠Episode 7 (Burning the Cabbage Patch Kids),⁠  (https://howweescaped.com/amanda-briggs-duggar-iblp-gothard-cabbage-patch/)  Amanda shared her story of growing up in the world of Bill Gothard and the Institute in Basic Life Principles (IBLP).

In this mini episode, she shares a story that was cut for time in Episode 7—about her time working in IBLP training centers, from Oak Brook, Illinois, to the Northwoods of Michigan’s Upper Peninsula.

You can listen to Amanda's podcast - The Cult I Left Behind - ⁠here⁠ (https://open.spotify.com/show/1oNHYt9VaYLXZKMKeLl01p) . 

Amanda's website is ⁠here⁠ (https://firstpointstrategies.com/) . 

Visit ⁠HowWeEscaped.com⁠ (https://HowWeEscaped.com)  for more episodes.

episodes.title: Burning the Cabbage Patch Kids - Growing Up in the World of Bill Gothard and IBLP
episodes.description: In this episode, I interview Amanda Briggs, co-host of The Cult I Left Behind, about her childhood inside IBLP — the controlling fundamentalist organization led by Bill Gothard and tied to the Duggar family. Amanda shares jaw-dropping stories of growing up under its fear-driven rules, including being made to burn her Cabbage Patch dolls in a backyard barrel and enduring years of abuse. Listener discretion is advised. You can listen to Amanda's podcast - The Cult I Left Behind - here . Amanda's website is here . Visit HowWeEscaped.com for more episodes. episodes.title: In the Wolf's Den - ten years inside a Canadian cult
episodes.description:
Alexandra Amor spent nearly a decade inside a high-control group in Vancouver, Canada — one that began, innocently enough, as a meditation class. In this episode, Alexandra recounts how a charismatic Austrian leader named Limori slowly tightened her grip on the group's members, manipulating their relationships and decisions. Drawing from her memoir, Cult: A Love Story, Alexandra traces her years within the group and the long road that eventually led her to freedom. 
#cults #cultsurvivor #cultawareness #mindcontrol 

Alexandra's Book: https://amzn.to/4v4zB73

Show Website: HowWeEscaped.com (https://HowWeEscaped.com)

episodes.title: An Everyday Cult
episodes.description: Gerette Buglion spent eighteen years searching for meaning within a manipulative, controlling group led by a man who claimed he could see into her soul through her dreams. She shares her story in her book An Everyday Cult. In this episode, Gerette opens up about her experience inside the group and reveals how she finally found the strength to break free. -------------------------------------------- Get Gerette's book here: https://amzn.to/4rSPQl8 (affiliate link) Visit Gerette's website: https://www.gerettebuglion.com/ Visit our show's website: ⁠HowWeEscaped.com⁠ -------------------------------------- Credits: "Ether Vox" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com) Licensed underCreative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ "ComfortableMystery 3" Kevin MacLeod (incompetech.com) Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Beautiful AmbientMelody by PatrickLieberkind -- https://freesound.org/s/341541/ -- License: Attribution 4.0 Farm Land Ambiance in Morning 0957 150405_0586 by klankbeeld -- https://freesound.org/s/813489/ -- License: Attribution 4.0

episodes.title: The Nameless Church
episodes.description: Deborah was born into a nameless church — a high-control group that rejected labels, claiming they were simply “saints gathered to the name of the Lord Jesus Christ.” In this episode, Deborah recounts her years inside this insular community and traces the difficult path that ultimately led her to freedom.
